messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0025",
  "title": "中国移动游戏2025年新品收入TOP榜",
  "page_index": 10,
  "page_range": "10"
}

Section text:
## 中国移动游戏2025年新品收入TOP榜

message.content: This section introduces a ranking of the highest-grossing new mobile games released in China in 2025. It is structured to answer questions regarding which new Chinese mobile titles achieved the top revenue positions in 2025, their specific ranking order, and associated financial performance metrics. The section is intended to present a table or figure listing game titles, revenue figures, and rank positions. Key retrieval targets include the 2025 timeframe, Chinese mobile gaming market, new game releases, revenue metrics, and top-performing titles. The provided excerpt contains only the section heading; specific game names, revenue amounts, and the complete ranking data are not included in the text.
